message:
DISASTER RELIEF COORDINATION — FOOD [MEDIUM priority]

TO: Red Cross Mandi (Mandi)
FROM: HP Disaster Relief Coordination

Request #N003: 60 unit(s) of Food needed at Mandi riverbank (reported by NGO field lead).
Notes: Ready-to-eat kits needed for one day

You are listed with 120 unit(s) available (Available, contact Verified). Estimated coverage: 100%.

Please CONFIRM dispatch of 60 unit(s) and expected arrival time.

— Match confidence: 87.5/100. Requires human coordinator approval before sending.

DISASTER RELIEF COORDINATION — SHELTER [CRITICAL priority]

TO: Govt Senior Secondary School Manali (Manali)
FROM: HP Disaster Relief Coordination

Request #N002: 25 unit(s) of Shelter needed at Manali ward 3 (reported by Local resident).
Notes: Families displaced after flash flood

You are listed with 80 unit(s) available (Can be activated as temporary shelter, contact Pending). Estimated coverage: 100%.

Please CONFIRM dispatch of 25 unit(s) and expected arrival time.

— Match confidence: 72.5/100. Requires human coordinator approval before sending.

DISASTER RELIEF COORDINATION — SHELTER [CRITICAL priority]

TO: demo.coordinator@example.com
SUBJECT: Approve outreach to SEEDS NGO Relief Team for need #N002

Matched provider: SEEDS NGO Relief Team (Mandi)
FROM: HP Disaster Relief Coordination

Request #N002: 25 unit(s) of Shelter needed at Manali ward 3 (reported by Local resident).
Notes: Families displaced after flash flood

You are listed with 60 unit(s) available (Available, contact Verified). Estimated coverage: 100%.

On approval, send outreach requesting dispatch of 25 unit(s) and expected arrival time.

— Match confidence: 75.0/100. Requires human coordinator approval before sending.
